purpose: Checklist that must be satisfied before a static adapter dashboard can be retired.
globalRule: Do not set retirementAllowed=true unless every checklist item is complete for that dashboard.

requiredEvidence.label: Authentication and role boundaries preserved
requiredEvidence.validation: Authenticated route check confirms protected route and successful login.

requiredEvidence.label: Command gating preserved
requiredEvidence.validation: High-risk actions are disabled or permission-gated in the package-native route.

requiredEvidence.label: Snapshot and health endpoints fresh
requiredEvidence.validation: Snapshot endpoint returns current project state and health endpoint is reachable.

requiredEvidence.label: Static route retained for first production promotion
requiredEvidence.validation: Existing production route remains recoverable during first package-native promotion.
